name: Dumbbell Fly
lead: Exercise for chest and front deltoids

instructions.starting position: Lying on the bench, your feet flat on the floor, one dumbbell in each hand. Hold the weights in a neutral grip, arms outstretched above your chest.
instructions.execution: Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides in an arc with your arms until you feel a stretch in your pectorals. Do not go below shoulder level. Then return to the original position, performing the same arc.
tips: Keep your elbows pointed outward and slightly bent to reduce stress on the joint.
Keep your shoulders flat against the bench.
